[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101101 5
1 01101000 3
2 01101000 3
3 11011111 7
4 11010010 4
5 11000011 4
6 10111001 5
7 01101000 3

01 10 01001101 4
12 21 01101000 3 match 1 2 7
23 32 01101000 3 match 1 2 7
34 43 01001000 2
45 54 00001101 3
56 65 00001100 2
67 76 10000000 1
70 07 11010001 4

02 20 01001000 2
13 31 01101000 3 match 1 2 7
24 42 01001000 2
35 53 00001000 1
46 64 10001110 4
57 75 00000001 1
60 06 10001110 4
71 17 01000001 2

03 30 01001000 2
14 41 01001101 4
25 52 00001000 1
36 63 00101000 2
47 74 11010001 4
50 05 00001101 3
61 16 00101100 3
72 27 01000000 1

04 40 11011111 7 match 3
15 51 00001101 3
26 62 00101000 2
37 73 01000000 1
[completion]
0 absent
1 12 21 23 32 13 31

none
